evals.prompt: Add a reactor that sends a notification when a Project is registered.
evals.expected_output: An IReactor class with a method (ProjectRegistered @event, EventContext context) that calls an injected notification service. Stateless and idempotent; primary-constructor injection.
assertions: Class implements IReactor; the handler dispatches by its first parameter (the event type)
Dependencies are injected via primary constructor; the class is stateless
Does not query the read model back inside the reactor

evals.prompt: Add a translation reactor that, when a Book is reserved, decreases stock by executing a DecreaseStock command.
evals.expected_output: An IReactor injecting ICommandPipeline and executing DecreaseStock (scopeless overload) in response to BookReserved. Does not inject IEventLog.
assertions: Triggers the other slice via ICommandPipeline.Execute (not by instantiating its handler)
Does not inject IEventLog to change state in another slice
Reactor is stateless and focused on one automation concern
